svg.text: Taxpayer · Portal Core — Filing a Return
After onboarding · dashboard → documents → review → regime → submit

g.text: ① Home — first time after onboarding
You're all verified. Ready to start your FY 2024-25 return.
Email verified · Phone verified · All consents granted · You can submit filings.
Auto-routed by date · No spreadsheets · Every rupee traces to a rule
Every rupee links to a section of the IT Act.
AI breaks → engine still computes correctly.
② Upload documents — auto-routed by FY
📄 Drop PDF or CSV here, or click to browse
Max 10 MB · Type auto-detected · No FY needed — router figures it out
Examined dates inside each document → routed each row to the right FY filing.
One bank CSV produced rows in TWO filings — FY2023-24 was auto-created.
No unresolved items. router_inbox is empty.
Every routing decision audited (routing_method='auto' on each transaction)
Continue to Regime — disabled until 100% verified
You filed FY 2023-24 under the OLD regime.
You are now requesting the NEW regime for FY 2024-25.
Because you have business/professional income, Section 115BAC(6)
permits this switch ONLY ONCE in your lifetime. After this filing,
you cannot return to the old regime as long as you have business income.
I have read and understood Section 115BAC(6) and confirm
I am exercising my one-time lifetime switch back to the new regime.
Source: Income Tax Act, 1961 — Section 115BAC(6) · acknowledgment_text_hash logged
⑤ Tax summary — every rupee traceable
Each slab references country_rules row · Finance Act 2024
Step 2 · apply_slab · rule rul_a1… v1 · Finance Act 2024, Section 115BAC
→ Stored in calculation_traces · final_total = ₹1,01,400 · replayable years later
All numbers reproducible from calculation_traces · audit_logs records every recalculation
✓ Email verified · Phone verified · All 3 consents granted
Enter the 6-digit code we just sent to
Code expires in 9:42 · bound to filing fil_d4… (single-use)
I confirm the information in this filing is accurate.
submit_otp_verification_id stored on tax_returns · enters officer L1 worklist
